caption: A man wearing glasses, a dark blue garment, and a traditional patterned blue and white cap is seated in front of a wooden wall. He maintains a steady, forward-facing gaze throughout the sequence, with minimal movement. In the top half of the image, a purple banner displays the text "PLUS POLITICS" and a larger white headline that reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". Below this, a white bar contains the text "WATCH ONLINE" and the URL "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV". The bottom half shows the same man and the same "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" text, but the bottom white bar is changed to say "SUBSCRIBE" and the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA". A "plustv" logo is visible in the upper left corner of each scene. The visual content remains largely static across the frames.
